headline: AT&T closed the sale of $6.5 billion aggregate principal amount of Global Notes across five tranches maturing between 2031 and 2056.
investor_impact: This $6.5 billion debt offering allows AT&T to extend its maturity profile and lock in long-term financing at yields ranging from 4.400% to 6.000%. Investors should update interest expense forecasts and monitor if proceeds are used for refinancing existing debt, which would be neutral to leverage, or for general corporate purposes.
